methodology: 50-prompt evaluation across 8 cognitive domains grounded in established cognitive science frameworks. Each prompt targets a specific construct (e.g., episodic encoding, modus tollens, false-belief task). All assertions are deterministic boolean predicates — no subjective or LLM-graded scoring.
